name: plain-language
description: Rewrite public prose for clear, translation-ready readers. Use when writing or editing website copy, docs wording, UI labels, public status copy, onboarding text, changelogs, guide text, localization-ready prose, A2-B1 English, ESL/non-native English reader copy, foreign-language reader copy, or broad public prose cleanup. Also use when the user asks for plain language, simple words, easier reading, translation-friendly wording, or copy that works across many languages.
